attributes.mlflow.spanInputs:
{"text": "SERVICE AGREEMENT
This Agreement is entered into on 01/03/2024 between:
GlobalTech Inc. (hereinafter "Service Provider")
AND
ABC Retail Corporation (hereinafter "Client")

WHEREAS the parties desire to set forth the terms of engagement,

1. SERVICES: Service Provider shall deliver software consulting services.
2. PAYMENT: Client shall pay USD 1,500 per month within 30 days of invoice.
3. CONFIDENTIALITY: Both parties shall maintain strict confidentiality.
4. TERMINATION: Either party may terminate with 30 days written notice.
5. JURISDICTION: Governed by laws of State of New York.
6. INDEMNIFICATION: Each party shall indemnify the other against third-party claims.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF the parties execute this Agreement on the date above."}
